<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Vonage\Numbers; use Vonage\Entity\Hydrator\HydratorInterface; class Hydrator implements HydratorInterface { public function hydrate(array $data) { $number = new Number(); return $this->hydrateObject($data, $number); } public function hydrateObject(array $data, $object) { $object->fromArray($data); return $object; } }
